WEBVTT 00:00.700 --> 00:04.110 Captions describe all relevant audio for the hearing impaired. [ Heroic music playing for a seagull ] 00:04.500 --> 00:05.000 [ Splash!!! ] 00:05.100 --> 00:06.000 [ Sploosh!!! ] 00:08.000 --> 00:09.225 [ Splash...splash...splash splash splash ] 00:10.525 --> 00:11.255 [ Splash, Sploosh again ] 00:13.500 --> 00:14.984 Dolphin: eeeEEEEEeeee! 00:14.984 --> 00:16.984 Dolphin: Squawk! eeeEEE? 00:25.000 --> 00:28.284 [ A whole ton of splashes ] 00:29.500 --> 00:31.000 Mine. Mine. Mine. 00:34.300 --> 00:36.000 Shark: Chomp 00:36.800 --> 00:37.900 Shark: CHOMP!!! 00:37.861 --> 00:41.193 EEEEEEOOOOOOOOOOWHALENOISE 00:42.593 --> 00:45.611 [ BIG SPLASH ]
